name: Montego Bags O' Wags Dog Treats - Munchies Beef 350g
description: Treat your dog to the mouth-watering taste of Bags O’ Wags Munchies , deliciously paw-shaped biscuits packed with beefy goodness! These handcrafted treats are made in small batches using only the finest ingredients to ensure top quality, great taste, and a satisfying crunch. Perfect as a training reward or a special snack just because, Munchies are both nutritious and fun , the kind of treat dogs can’t wait to wag their tails for! Key Features: Roast Beef Flavour: Rich, savoury taste dogs love Paw-Shaped Biscuits: Fun to chew and easy to serve Handcrafted in Small Batches: Made with care and quality ingredients Ideal Training Treat: Nutritious and rewarding Suitable for all adult dogs Ingredients: Wheat and whole wheat flour, chicken meal, palm oil, milk powder (lactose reduced), brewer’s yeast, calcium carbonate, sugars and salt. ADDITIVES:  SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers, white colour and beef flavour; PRESERVATIVES:  Potassium sorbate and sodium metabisulphite. Nutritional Information Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 18% Total Fat 12% Crude Fibre 2% Moisture 10% Omega-6 fatty acids 0.3%  Metabolisable energy  420 kcal/100g Make every treat time special with Bags O’ Wags Munchies - fun, flavour, and goodness in every bite!
